## Summary

- [ ] Describe the feature or fix clearly

## Sync Checklist

- [ ] README updated when user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] `docs/02-database-schema.md` updated when schema changed
- [ ] `docs/03-api.md` updated when API changed
- [ ] `api/openapi.yaml` updated when API changed
- [ ] `docs/05-test-cases.md` updated when logic changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] `make check-sync` executed
